title: VersionApprover
description: Contains details about a version approver.

accountId.description: The Atlassian account ID of the approver.

declineReason.description: A description of why the user is declining the approval.

description.description: A description of what the user is approving within the specified version.

status.description: The status of the approval, which can be *PENDING*, *APPROVED*, or *DECLINED*
